# tidyup-extract fixtures

Small binary fixtures for integration tests. Each is the smallest valid
document the corresponding extractor should recognise and transcribe.

| File         | How it was generated                                                                         |
| ------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `sample.mp3` | `ffmpeg -f lavfi -i anullsrc` + ID3 metadata (`title`, `artist`, `album`, `genre`, `date`)   |
| `sample.jpg` | 4x4 solid-colour JPEG from ffmpeg, prefixed with a hand-crafted APP1/EXIF segment (Make, Model, Orientation) |
| `sample.xlsx`| Minimal Office Open XML workbook (5 parts) built by `zipfile` in Python                      |
| `sample.pdf` | Minimal single-page PDF with selectable text long enough to clear `MIN_EXTRACTED_CHARS`      |

All fixtures are original works generated by the tidyup authors. No third-party
binaries are redistributed here.
